# hindclaw_mental_model (Resource)

Manages a Hindsight mental model.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_mental_model" "user_profile" {
  bank_id      = "agent-alpha"
  name         = "User Profile"
  source_query = "What do we know about the user?"
  tags         = ["profile", "core"]
  max_tokens   = 4096
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier.
- `name` (String) Mental model name.
- `source_query` (String) Query used to build the model.

### Optional

- `max_tokens` (Number) Max tokens for the model content (default 2048).
- `tags` (List of String) Tags for the mental model.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Mental model identifier (computed by server).
